title: Pleurolobus gangeticus
taxonomy: Pleurolobus gangeticus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and the genus Pleurolobus. The plant is native to the Indian subcontinent and is commonly found in various habitats, including grasslands and forests. The classification of Pleurolobus gangeticus is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis. The plant's classification is an essential aspect of understanding its evolution and relationships with other species in the Fabaceae family.
